title: Happy Hour
detail: Every Wednesday, Thursday and Friday, 4–7 PM.

title: Cellar Raid Tuesdays: 50% Off Wine Bottles
detail: Every Tuesday in the enoteca: half off bottles of wine.

title: BOGO Happy Hour
detail: Daily 4–9 PM: buy one get one on select domestic beers and select liquor.

title: Saturday $1 Shots
detail: Shot specials for $1, Saturdays before 7 PM.

title: Thursday Happy Hour
detail: Every Thursday, 4–8 PM — drink specials after work.

title: Tuesday All-Night Happy Hour + Free Darts
detail: All-night happy hour plus open darts free play, every Tuesday.
